prBody:
## Summary

- Add `StreakEngine` pure Swift struct in `FitnessTracker/Domain/StreakEngine.swift` with no SwiftUI or SwiftData dependencies
- `currentStreak(activityDates:today:calendar:)` — counts consecutive active days ending on today or yesterday (streak stays "live" until a 2-day gap occurs, per FR-003)
- `longestStreak(activityDates:calendar:)` — scans the full date history and returns the best consecutive-day run
- Both methods normalise inputs to calendar-day granularity and handle duplicate dates transparently
- `StreakEngineTests` covers: empty input, zero-streak (gap), single-day (today & yesterday), multi-day, gap reset, today extending an existing streak, unsorted input, duplicate deduplication, and longest-streak selection across multiple runs (20+ test cases)

Closes #30
